case_title: BRIAN T. HOLT ET AL VS. JOHN E. MCINERNEY III ET AL

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-19-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-24-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-19-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-13-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLT, BRIAN T. HOLT, NICOLE LYNN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCINERNEY III, JOHN E. FRANCES L. MAHONEY REVOCABLE TRUST AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF' CLAIM AGAINST JAMES S. MCINERNEY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE EVIDENCE SUPPORTS THAT THE DEFENDANT, UPON PLAINTIFFS' EARLY TERMINATION OF THE ONE YEAR LEASE, ACTED REASONABLY AND IN A GOOD FAITH EFFORT TO MITIGATE RENTAL LOSS RESULTING FROM THE EARLY TERMINATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLT, BRIAN T. HOLT, NICOLE LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT MCINERNEY III, JOHN E.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
